expanse.name: Expanse
expanse.customThemeNote: /n1. When the theme setting 'Enable additional checkout buttons' is enabled, the PayPal Dynamic Checkout button breaks./n2. Version 5.0.0 has a bug where the incorrect variant is added to the cart on first load - fixed in 5.1.0.

local.name: Local
local.customThemeNote: The annoucement bar does not have a setting to rotate automatically. Merchant should reach out to theme dev if required.

kalles.name: Kalles
kalles.customThemeNote: Kalles comes with a page builder app called E-Composer. Please ensure the merchant has done troubleshooting with Kalles before reaching out to Plus FED or Theme Support.
